Value: Strain through a fine mesh siev and store in quart containers, in the cooler.
Alternative: place beef fat in a vac bag and place in steam oven or sous vide bath until rendered.  Strain and reserve as well.
Combine beef fat renderings and clarified butter in a mixing bowl and whisk together until homogenous.
Reserve in a squeeze bottle in a warm, dry place in the kitchen for service.
To heat up for service, place a sealed deli or squeeze bottle in a warm water bath or steam oven until fully rendered back.
